title: Gunpowder Recipe Mod
description: Craft gunpowder using flints, glowstones and coals.
body:
📖 Description

Too lazy to make a Creeper farm? Your weapon mods require too much gunpowder? Then this is the solution for you!!! The Emerald Institution of Technology has discovered a new formula to refine gunpowder using glowstone, flint and coal. This mod is greatly inspired by Craft gunpowder by Habilidade_Deus_Ex, but the owner has never updated the mod pas 1.12.2. I have also switched the use of redstones with glowstones since glowstones are harder to obtain because you need to go to the Nether and Fortune does not work on them.

🛠️ Recipes

All recipes listed below are shapeless ( Ingredients position is not matter ). You can also switch coal with charcoal.

❓FAQ

  • Can I include your mod in my mod pack?
  • Of course!
  • I find some problems with your code. Where can I report it?
  • You can contact me on Discord
